violations.text: Some ceiling tiles in the backroom area and restroom are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island certified Food Protection Manager, PIC has Food Safety Manager certificate. Application was provided during time of inspection, PIC to submit application within 48 business hours. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024
Some ceiling tiles in the backroom area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

-The urinal in the men's bathroom was observed draining slowly. -The hose bib on the mop sink was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The ceiling in the (back prep area/ware washing) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the (back room/ware washing area) do not have coving/were observed in poor repair. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The (ceiling tiles) in the (back room and men's bathroom) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
